title: Argon Tableware 12x White Pasta Bowls - 23cm (9") - Ceramic Dinner Plates Dish Set Cereal Soup Serving Noodle Bowl - Dishwasher and Microwave Safe
features: Ideal for Soups & Saucy Dishes: These 23cm (9") soup bowls feature a rimmed design that reduces spills and drips, making them perfect for soups, stews, or any saucy dish, keeping your tablecloth or surface clean during meals.

Durable Porcelain Build: Crafted from high-quality porcelain, these soup bowls are built to last for daily use while maintaining their elegant appearance, making them ideal for both casual family meals and special dinner gatherings.

Heat-Resistant & Microwave Safe: Vitrified for added heat resistance, these soup bowls can be used in the microwave or oven to heat your dishes. Perfect for serving soups, stews, and other meals directly from the oven or microwave.

Dishwasher-Safe for Effortless Cleaning: These bowls are designed to be dishwasher-safe, making cleanup a breeze. Enjoy your meal without the worry of extensive cleaning afterward – just place them in the dishwasher for a quick and easy clean.

Timeless White Elegance: With a sleek and classic white design, these soup bowls blend seamlessly with any décor. Whether for your home kitchen or a restaurant, they add minimalist sophistication to your table setting or buffet.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to pinatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! White Crockery By Argon Tableware Crafted from porcelain, this collection of white crockery have been fully vitrified against the absorption of strong colours and flavours, making them the perfect tableware solution for all kitchens. Their white colour blends seamlessly with any style of décor and, as with all our china crockery, each bowl is microwave and dishwasher safe. With a complete matching suite of classic white crockery available, Argon Tableware is the perfect choice for creating your ultimate dining table setup.
